name: OpenWiki Docs Fork Smoke
prompt: Run /openwiki-docs:init if openwiki/quickstart.md is missing; otherwise run /openwiki-docs:update. If OpenWiki documentation changed, create a branch named openwiki/smoke, commit only openwiki/** plus top-level AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md changes, and open a pull request titled "docs: OpenWiki smoke test". If no docs changes are needed, do not create a commit or PR.
